texto: Compassion is born from the imagination. To have the desire to be compassionate, you have to imagine a world that’s better than the one you live in.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Ryan Henry Ward Artist sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “Compassion is born from the imagination. To have the desire to be compassionate, you have to imag…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, compassion, imagination, útil em momentos de reflexao.
